grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: Explicitly references 'CA Protocol 4.0' at the beginning and end

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: Clearly states 'less than 4 years ago' and 'usual 4-year immunity period for planning breaches hasn't yet passed'

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Provides both options: 'Obtain regularisation certificate' OR 'Arrange bespoke indemnity insurance'

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: No mention of building regulations - only focuses on planning permission issues

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Only mentions 4-year rule, no reference to 10-year or 12-month enforcement periods
